behavior_in_task_description.reason: Tests assert on specific identifiers like 'jsobjs_len' parameter name, 'validateJSObjRefIdx' function, '.jsbuf' field, 'initRedirections' function, and exact error string 'Invalid JS object reference in shell' — none of these internal names (except the error string) are mentioned in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes symptoms and expected behavior without prescribing specific code changes or variable names.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests hardcode gold-specific implementation details: 'jsobjs_len: u32' field name (test_sentinel_bun_prefix_roundtrip), 'const jsobjs_len: u32 = @intCast(jsobjs.len)' exact expression (test_sentinel_bunstr_prefix_roundtrip), and 'idx >= self.jsobjs_len' / 'idx >= interpreter.jsobjs.len' exact comparison syntax — alternative correct fixes using different naming would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The f2p tests (test_sentinel_bun_prefix_roundtrip, test_sentinel_bunstr_prefix_roundtrip, test_raw_sentinel_no_crash) are all regex/substring checks on .zig source text, not behavior execution; only pass_to_pass tests actually invoke bun.

test_not_tautological.reason: Since f2p tests only grep for strings like 'jsobjs_len: u32' and 'idx >= self.jsobjs_len', an agent could insert those literal strings as comments or unused code without actually fixing the bug and pass the tests.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction requires testing that strings round-trip correctly and out-of-bounds references throw 'Invalid JS object reference in shell', but no f2p test actually runs shell interpolation with a sentinel string or triggers the error path — they only check source text patterns.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and named descriptively.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code-only, produces no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and references in instruction.md appear consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the four files to modify but this is expected scope guidance, not line-level localization.
